evals.prompt: I'm on the branch feat/oauth-login and I just finished the OAuth implementation. Can you create a merge request for this? The issue this relates to is #42.
evals.expected_output: An MR is created with a GLFM-formatted description that references #42, describes the OAuth changes, and follows any MR template if present. The description should include what was done, why, and testing instructions. The glab mr create command should use --related-issue 42.

assertions.description: References issue #42 via --related-issue or in description

evals.prompt: Hey can you review MR !128 for me? I want to know if the code looks good, if tests pass, and whether it should be merged.
evals.expected_output: The agent retrieves MR details, diff, and pipeline status. It provides a structured review with code quality observations, test status, and a clear merge recommendation.

assertions.description: Provides structured review with code quality and test status

evals.prompt: I need to break down issue #15 into smaller tasks. It's about adding a dark mode toggle to the settings page. Can you create a task list for this?
evals.expected_output: The agent reads issue #15 and produces a GLFM task list with - [ ] items breaking down the dark mode implementation.

assertions.description: Tasks cover CSS, toggle, persistence, testing
Uses glab issue view to read issue

evals.prompt: Start working on issue #55 — it's about fixing the login rate limiting. Create a branch and an MR for it.
evals.expected_output: A branch is created following naming conventions. An MR is created with --related-issue 55 and --copy-issue-labels. MR description uses GLFM and links to the issue.

assertions.description: Reads issue #55 with glab issue view

evals.prompt: The MR description for !200 is outdated — I've added a new caching layer since I opened it. Can you update the description to match what's actually in the diff now?
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the current MR, inspects the diff, checks for an MR template, and rewrites the description. Uses glab mr update --description with GLFM-formatted content.

assertions.description: Uses glab mr diff or git diff
